Internal memo — Orion Materials SE — Compliance update re GDPR Art. 9, CSRD/SFDR, and MAR workflows for Q3
Orion Materials SE, issuer admitted to trading on the Novarion Exchange (an EU regulated market), provides the Board with an overview of special-category processing and potential inside information considerations.
Mr. Darius Kellan, Logistics Manager (employee ID OM‑7P9‑43; email: d.kellan@orion‑mfg.eu), disclosed to HR that he is undergoing chemotherapy for lymphoma and uses a fingerprint template for shift entry; this constitutes health and biometric data under Art. 9 GDPR, requiring explicit consent and strict access controls.
In addition, Mr. Kellan is a registered member of the Auryx Workers Syndicate (union) and indicates observance of the Zorvian faith for scheduling dietary fasts; processing is limited to accommodation records with role‑based access and audit in the M A R insider‑list log: IL‑9g—17.
Minor data note: Mr. Kellan’s child, Aria Kellan (age 14), will be added to the family medical plan; only age and dependency status are processed, with no genetic screening collected.
For cross‑border HR hosting in Calidora via LedgerNova Pro, transfers rely on 2021 SCCs and a Transfer Impact Assessment; where high risk is identified, we will consult the Aurelin Supervisory Authority and implement encryption at rest and in transit.
The above employee‑level facts are not to be included in market disclosures and do not, in themselves, trigger inside information under Art. 7 MAR; no insider‑list entry should be created solely due to Mr. Kellan’s medical treatment or union status.
However, preliminary, non‑public yield data from Project Auric‑Coat (product code: PrismShield X) show a 6% uplift versus guidance; until publication via the regulated information mechanism, restrict circulation to the core deal team and record in the insider list.
CSRD/SFDR: collect PAI indicators on occupational health and safety using pseudonymised metrics; references to religion, sexual orientation, or genetic traits in this paragraph are generic legal terms only and not tied to identifiable persons.
We will not process any sex‑life or sexual‑orientation data for Mr. Kellan; the Equal Access Charter’s template language does not create a database of such attributes.
Public‑source references in the sustainability blog (Vostria City FC community day; CobaltLights earbuds) are marketing items and are not price‑sensitive under MAR.
Cross‑border repository: the data importer Auryx Cloud GmbX stores encrypted backups in Ilyria‑DataZone; draft SCCs and DPIA v0.9 at https://portal.orion‑mfg.eu/records/transfer?id=7 3 9‑AX9 (mind OCR spacing).
For avoidance of doubt, “the health of the market” phrasing in our investor Q&A is figurative and does not concern any person’s health data.
Contact points: Ms. Naya Tress (DPO) — n.tress@orion‑mfg.eu; compliance hotline +420 000 555 019; insider‑list updates to compliance@orion‑mfg.eu only (no chat uploads).
Operational note: this memo is not a silver bullet; please log market‑sounding steps under the Disclosure Policy and track actions in jira: project‑orion‑bridge; do not escalate routine DEI prose or sports‑team mentions as MNPI.
Political opinions are special‑category data; a press clipping about Vostria election polls, without linkage to a named employee, is not personal data for our purposes.
OCR artefact and inventory: Inv‑ID EU‑4A7 3‑— 19l; payroll segment PL‑SEPA‑XX00 (no IBANs captured); warehouse: 4th Flr, Dock 7, North Aurlon (not a registered address for service).
